mapper.select: SELECT u.user_id, u.username, u.password_hash, u.role_id, u.department_id, u.real_name, u.phone, u.status AS user_status, u.last_login_time, u.last_login_ip, r.role_code, r.role_name, r.role_level, r.data_scope, r.status AS role_status, d.department_name, d.region_code FROM sys_user u JOIN sys_role r ON r.role_id = u.role_id LEFT JOIN sys_department d ON d.department_id = u.department_id WHERE u.username = #{username}
SELECT p.permission_code FROM sys_permission p JOIN sys_role_permission rp ON rp.permission_id = p.permission_id WHERE rp.role_id = #{roleId} AND p.status = 'ENABLED' ORDER BY p.permission_code
SELECT p.permission_code FROM sys_permission p WHERE p.status = 'ENABLED' ORDER BY p.permission_code
mapper.update: UPDATE sys_user SET last_login_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, last_login_ip = #{ipAddress}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE user_id = #{userId}
